title: Senior Teacher - Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited:
Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited!
